data.body:
this is a regression of something we already fixed.

column label text overruns the component to the right when all columns are visible.

what should happen is

column label text never overruns, ever

the 'hide' icon/component should wrap
the 'count' component should wrap

we don't want to require all 3 to be in the same row, they can wrap to provide more room for the labels.

but the label text itself should never overrun it's component (or the column)
data.title: Overview column title formatting problems
